summary: The user is planning a road trip to the mountains in June and seeks advice on preparing their bike for the trip. They also discuss tracking bike mileage, calculating average speed, and selecting a bike rack, specifically the Saris Bones 2-Bike Trunk Rack, while sharing that they recently installed bike lights for improved visibility during early morning rides.
facts: The user is planning a road trip to the mountains in June. The user is currently tracking their bike mileage, which is at 347 miles since the start of the year. The user plans to order a Saris Bones 2-Bike Trunk Rack next week. The user recently installed a new set of bike lights for $40. The user rides in low-light conditions during early morning rides. The user is interested in tips for preparing their bike for a long trip. The user is looking for ways to track their bike mileage more accurately and calculate their average speed. The user is considering factors for choosing the right bike rack for their car.
